query: Test: autonomous multi-agent research system architecture

plan: Define system requirements and goals for the autonomous multi-agent research system
Conduct literature review on existing multi-agent systems and autonomous research architectures
Identify key components and technologies necessary for the system, such as agent frameworks and knowledge graphs
Design a high-level architecture for the system, including data flow and communication protocols
Develop a detailed design for each component, including agent behaviors and decision-making processes
Implement a prototype of the system and test its functionality and performance
Evaluate the system's effectiveness and identify areas for improvement
retrieval_queries: distributed data management for multi-agent systems
